items.docs: Submit any standard Ethereum JSON-RPC 2.0 request. The `method` field selects the operation. Common methods include `eth_chainId`, `eth_blockNumber`, `eth_getBalance`, `eth_getTransactionByHash`, `eth_getTransactionReceipt`, `eth_call`, `eth_sendRawTransaction`, `eth_estimateGas`, `eth_getBlockByNumber`, `eth_getLogs`, `net_version`, `web3_clientVersion`.
